a215-1.description: R session scope budget stale 3 audits at 20% compliance. Create wq item to evaluate whether the scope budget metric should exclude directive-plan files.
a215-1.resolution: RESOLVED. wq-912 completed in s1877 (B#580). Added BRIEFING.md to ROUTINE_FILES and implemented dynamic plan_files exclusion for active directives. d075 configured with plan_files: ['HOOK_CONSOLIDATION_PLAN.md']. R scope budget improved from 1/5 (20%) to 4/5 (80%). Only s1873 remains in violation with 4 genuine non-routine files.
a215-1.metric_after: 4/5 compliant (80%). Metric now accurately reflects scope creep vs directive work.

a215-2.description: Credential recycling pattern: '1800+ sessions' phrase appears in 4/12 recent E session traces (33%). Add credential-diversity check to E session posthook.
a215-2.resolution: IN PROGRESS. wq-913 created but still pending. Current rate: 2/5 (40%) in last 5 E sessions (s1859, s1869). Pattern unchanged — same '1800+ sessions' phrase. No posthook advisory implemented yet.

recommended_actions.description: Picker compliance tracker inflates s1874 from 33% actual to 100% reported. BUDGET_CAP skips without backup substitutions are counted as non-violations. Fix the compliance tracker to only excuse BUDGET_CAP skips when a backup substitution was applied, or flag the session as partial compliance.
23-outcome-feedback.sh has a runtime arithmetic expression error on line 36 (0\n0: syntax error). Non-fatal but recurring in hooks.log. Fix the expression parsing.
